Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(CASE WHEN (up.applicability = true) THEN up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" ELSE bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" END * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs LEFT OUTER JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/a8cf9c1525f653c8a219e02622a7697062c60adbce62f2e6f4bc01a9918efd9c/3e0981b5-ea5a-4c64-acd8-2a0b31b3e294/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
